title: Central AC Installation
description: Complete central air conditioning installation for a 2,400 sq ft home. High-efficiency unit with smart thermostat integration.

title: Tankless Water Heater Upgrade
description: Replaced a 15-year-old tank water heater with a high-efficiency tankless unit. Endless hot water with lower energy bills.

title: Complete HVAC System Replacement
description: Full HVAC system replacement including furnace, AC unit, and ductwork modification. Improved efficiency by over 40%.

title: Whole-House Duct Cleaning & Sealing
description: Complete duct system cleaning and aeroseal duct sealing. Reduced energy waste and eliminated hot/cold spots throughout the home.

title: Emergency Burst Pipe Repair
description: Responded to an emergency burst pipe call on a winter night. Isolated the leak, repaired the damaged section, and restored water service within hours.

title: Ductless Mini-Split Installation
description: Installed a multi-zone ductless mini-split system for a home addition without existing ductwork. Provides both heating and cooling.
